name: API debug
when_to_use: A user reported an API call failing, returning wrong data, or behaving unexpectedly

name: SDK debug
when_to_use: A user reported the SDK throwing, hanging, or returning wrong data

name: CLI debug
when_to_use: A user reported a command failing, hanging, or producing unexpected output

name: Error UX debug
when_to_use: A reported error message is unclear, unactionable, or misleading; includes user-facing migration/upgrade error friction

name: Inner-loop debug
when_to_use: A user reported the local dev loop being slow, flaky, or broken

name: Auth debug
when_to_use: A user reported auth failing, token rotation breaking, or scope errors

name: Plugin debug
when_to_use: A user reported a plugin/extension not loading or behaving unexpectedly

name: IDE debug
when_to_use: A user reported autocomplete, LSP, or hover docs being wrong or missing

name: Perf debug
when_to_use: A user reported install, startup, or build/test being too slow

name: Package debug
when_to_use: A user reported install errors, peer-dep mismatches, type-resolution failures, or registry issues

name: Logging debug
when_to_use: A user reported missing context in logs, leaked secrets in verbose output, or unreadable structured logs

name: Config debug
when_to_use: A user reported confusing config precedence, validation errors, or invisible-effective-config

name: Agent debug
when_to_use: A user reported coding-agent loops, blocked commands, or wrong context from AGENTS.md

name: AI/Agent SDK debug
when_to_use: A user reported streaming breaking, structured output failing, the agent loop running away, or tool schemas drifting
